description_long: This is a long, narrow banner featuring a collage of colorful graphics and text, likely used for advertising or event promotion in an urban environment. The banner displays a mix of pastel and vibrant hues, with visible illustrations and stylized writing, possibly including brand names or event details. The surface appears slightly wrinkled, suggesting it is made from a flexible material such as vinyl or fabric. The edges are uneven and the banner seems to lack a rigid frame, indicating it may be temporarily mounted or suspended. There are no visible mounting poles or hardware, and the banner's length dominates its overall appearance. The design is eye-catching, intended to attract attention from passersby in busy public spaces.
description: A long, colorful banner with graphic designs and text, made from flexible material and intended for urban advertising or event use.
description_view_0: The banner's left side is visible, showing a mix of pastel graphics and some text, with a slightly wrinkled surface.
description_view_1: The right side of the banner is more prominent, with additional colorful illustrations and a visible taper at one end.
description_view_2: This view highlights the central section of the banner, where the graphics and text are most concentrated and vibrant.
description_view_3: The banner is seen from an angle, emphasizing its length and the uneven, flexible edges.
